title: dortmanna gardneriana
intro: Dortmanna gardneriana, also known as Marsh St John's Wort, is a flowering plant native to the wetlands of North America and Europe. This perennial plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Marsh St John's Wort include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of eczema and other skin conditions. Marsh St John's Wort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy digestive system.
